Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Um... I know what you're thinking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Yukari always tells me it's like having a second lounge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Haha, my apologies. I admit, it's a tad excessive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Our maid staff assisted with the furnishings... That's the reason it looks like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Although... maybe I shouldn't be making excuses.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Up until now, I held strong to the idea that I must live by the honor of the Kirijo name.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}But despite how occupied I should have been with the family business, I always found time to spend with you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}It made me realize I'd been running away this whole time... Running from the truth of what I really wanted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Now that the engagement's broken off, it's been complete chaos around me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}But I know we can make it through this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Some are calling me a spoiled brat who's ruining everything... But beyond that are many others showing their support.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}It's been a much-needed reminder that I'm not alone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 13 4 15 5}Right... I apologize for worrying you. I couldn't have done this without you paving the way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Allow me to thank you on behalf of the Group. I'm certain my father would feel the same way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 13 4 5 5}I won't. It's those people who are my strength... and the strength of the Kirijo family.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I never would have realized this if I didn't have you as a friend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 13 4 5 5}No... I gained that strength thanks to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}If you hadn't opened my eyes, I very well could have turned out as contemptible as my ex-fiancé.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Ever since we met, my life has been full of new experiences.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}You're always showing me sides of this world that I've never seen before.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}The memories we've made—fighting side-by-side, exploring the city, or even just passing the hours talking—I'll treasure them forever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Treating you to a cup of tea here is hardly going to repay you for everything you've done for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}But think of it as my pledge to give you my full support from now on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I'll do whatever I can to make sure that happens.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru's gratitude and resolve is clear...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}All right, I'm going to call Yukari and the others. Settle down and make yourself comfortable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I should warn you, there's no telling how long we can talk over tea and snacks. I hope you're prepared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We all chatted as the hours flew by...[n]{f 1 1}
